source: OIC ERP Accounting Module — Complete Transaction & Financial Report Integration (from meeting bug list + PDF technical guides)

features.title: Standardize AP Bill Expense Account — COGS vs EXPENSE_DEFAULT Consistency
acceptance_criteria: moveInvoiceToSent() in finance-invoices.ts uses SYS_ACCOUNTS.EXPENSE_DEFAULT for INV_IN (vendor bill) posting, NOT SYS_ACCOUNTS.COGS — COGS is reserved for manufacturing/sales COGS only
approveVendorBill() in finance-ap.ts already uses EXPENSE_DEFAULT — verify it matches moveInvoiceToSent()
approveAndPayBill() in finance-ap.ts uses EXPENSE_DEFAULT consistently (not COGS)
Add code comment explaining: 'Vendor bills debit EXPENSE_DEFAULT (6900). COGS (5000) is only debited when inventory items are SOLD, not when purchased.'
npx vitest run passes (no regressions)
npx tsc --noEmit passes

features.title: Atomic GL Posting — Revert Document Status on Journal Entry Failure
acceptance_criteria: recordVendorPayment() in finance-ap.ts: if postJournalEntry() fails, delete the Payment record and revert bill balanceDue/status — payment must NOT exist without corresponding GL entry
recordARPayment() in finance-ar.ts: same atomic behavior — if GL posting fails, revert payment and invoice status
recordInvoicePayment() in finance-invoices.ts: same atomic behavior
recordMultiBillPayment() in finance-ap.ts: if GL posting fails, revert all bill balance updates and delete payment
Each revert path logs a clear error: 'Jurnal gagal — pembayaran dibatalkan' (Journal failed — payment reverted)
npx vitest run passes
npx tsc --noEmit passes

features.title: Fixed Asset Depreciation GL Posting (Penyusutan Aset Tetap)
acceptance_criteria: New function postDepreciationRun() in finance-fixed-assets.ts that: queries all ACTIVE fixed assets with pending depreciation schedules, creates one journal entry per asset: DR SYS_ACCOUNTS.DEPRECIATION (6290 Beban Penyusutan), CR SYS_ACCOUNTS.ACC_DEPRECIATION (1590 Akumulasi Penyusutan)
Each depreciation schedule row stores journal_entry_id after posting and is marked as posted (is_posted = true or similar flag)
Depreciation amount calculated as: (purchaseCost - salvageValue) / usefulLifeMonths per the straight-line method
Function validates fiscal period is OPEN before posting — rejects if period is CLOSED
Updates the fixed asset's accumulatedDepreciation and currentBookValue (NBV = cost - accum) after posting
Idempotency: calling postDepreciationRun() twice for the same period does NOT create duplicate entries
Uses ensureSystemAccounts() before posting
Balance Sheet impact: Account 1500 stays at original cost, Account 1590 (contra-asset) increases. Net Book Value = 1500 - 1590
P&L impact: Account 6290 (Depreciation Expense) increases → reduces Net Profit
npx vitest run passes
npx tsc --noEmit passes

features.title: Complete Debit/Credit Note GL Posting (Nota Debit & Nota Kredit)
acceptance_criteria: createDCNote() in finance-dcnotes.ts is complete (not truncated) and posts journal entries via postJournalEntry()
Sales Credit Note (SALES_CN) journal: DR Revenue (4000) + DR PPN Keluaran (2110), CR AR (1200) — reverses original invoice revenue and tax
Purchase Debit Note (PURCHASE_DN) journal: DR AP (2000), CR Expense/Inventory + CR PPN Masukan (1330) — reverses vendor bill
Settlement logic: when DC note is applied to an invoice, update invoice.balanceDue accordingly
If goods are physically returned with Sales CN, also post: DR Inventory (1300), CR COGS (5000) — COGS reversal
Each note stores journalEntryId for audit trail
Uses ensureSystemAccounts() and SYS_ACCOUNTS constants (no hardcoded codes)
npx vitest run passes
npx tsc --noEmit passes

features.title: Cash Flow Statement Reconciliation (Arus Kas — Metode Tidak Langsung)
acceptance_criteria: getCashFlowStatement() in finance-reports.ts or finance-cashflow.ts calculates Opening Cash = GL balance of accounts 1000+1050+1110+1111 at period start
Operating Activities: Net Profit (from P&L) + add-back non-cash items (Depreciation 6290, Bad Debt 6500) + working capital changes (delta AR 1200, delta Inventory 1300, delta AP 2000, delta PPN)
Investing Activities: Fixed asset purchases (debits to 1500) and disposals (credits from 1500 minus accum depreciation)
Financing Activities: Changes in equity accounts (3xxx) and long-term liabilities (2500 if exists)
FINAL CHECK: Opening Cash + Operating + Investing + Financing = Closing Cash (must equal GL cash account balances at period end)
If reconciliation doesn't balance, report shows 'Selisih Arus Kas' (Cash Flow Discrepancy) amount
Report displays all three sections with subtotals in Rupiah format
npx vitest run passes
npx tsc --noEmit passes

features.title: Finance Dashboard KPIs from GL Accounts (Not Invoice Table)
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard Cash Balance KPI queries SUM of GL account balances for accounts 1000, 1050, 1110, 1111 (all cash/bank accounts) — NOT from invoice payments
Dashboard AR Outstanding KPI queries GL account 1200 balance — NOT SUM(invoice.balanceDue WHERE type=INV_OUT)
Dashboard AP Outstanding KPI queries GL account 2000 balance — NOT SUM(invoice.balanceDue WHERE type=INV_IN)
Dashboard Net Margin calculates from GL: (SUM 4xxx credits - SUM 5xxx+6xxx+7xxx debits) / SUM 4xxx credits × 100
If GL balance and invoice sub-ledger disagree, show a warning badge: 'Saldo GL tidak cocok dengan sub-ledger' (GL balance doesn't match sub-ledger)
All KPIs update when journal entries are posted (not just when invoices change)
npx vitest run passes
npx tsc --noEmit passes

features.title: GL Integrity Checks API Endpoint (Pemeriksaan Integritas Buku Besar)
acceptance_criteria: New server action runIntegrityChecks() in finance-gl.ts that returns an array of check results
Check 1: AR sub-ledger = GL 1200 — SUM(invoice.balanceDue WHERE type=INV_OUT AND status NOT IN CANCELLED/VOID) must equal GLAccount 1200 balance. Report any difference.
Check 2: AP sub-ledger = GL 2000 — SUM(invoice.balanceDue WHERE type=INV_IN AND status NOT IN CANCELLED/VOID) must equal GLAccount 2000 balance
Check 3: Trial Balance — SUM(all journal line debits) = SUM(all journal line credits) for POSTED entries
Check 4: Balance Sheet equation — Total Assets (1xxx accounts) = Total Liabilities (2xxx) + Total Equity (3xxx + current year earnings from 4xxx-7xxx)
Check 5: No orphan journal lines — every JournalLine has a valid, POSTED JournalEntry parent
Each check returns: { name, status: 'PASS'|'FAIL', expected, actual, difference }
Results are in Bahasa Indonesia (e.g., 'Piutang Usaha Cocok', 'Neraca Seimbang')
npx vitest run passes
npx tsc --noEmit passes

features.title: PPN Settlement Journal Entry (Setor PPN Bulanan)
acceptance_criteria: New function postPPNSettlement() in finance-gl.ts or a new finance-tax.ts file
Calculates net PPN: PPN Keluaran (2110 balance) minus PPN Masukan (1330 balance) for the specified period
If PPN Keluaran > PPN Masukan (owe tax): DR PPN Keluaran (2110), CR PPN Masukan (1330), CR Bank (1110) for the net amount
If PPN Masukan > PPN Keluaran (excess input tax): DR PPN Keluaran (2110), CR PPN Masukan (1330), CR PPN Lebih Bayar (new account 1410 — add to SYS_ACCOUNTS)
After settlement, both PPN Keluaran and PPN Masukan balances are zeroed for the period
Validates fiscal period is still OPEN before posting
Stores settlement reference for e-Faktur reconciliation
Uses ensureSystemAccounts() — adds PPN_LEBIH_BAYAR to SYS_ACCOUNTS if missing
npx vitest run passes
npx tsc --noEmit passes

features.title: Fixed Asset Disposal GL Posting (Pelepasan Aset Tetap)
acceptance_criteria: New function disposeFixedAsset() in finance-fixed-assets.ts that handles 3 scenarios
Scenario A — Sold at book value: DR Bank (1110) [proceeds], DR Accumulated Depreciation (1590) [total accum], CR Fixed Assets (1500) [original cost]
Scenario B — Sold above book value (gain): same as A plus CR Other Income (4300) [proceeds - book value]
Scenario C — Sold below book value (loss): same as A plus DR Loss on Disposal (add LOSS_DISPOSAL to SYS_ACCOUNTS, e.g. 8100) [book value - proceeds]
Book Value calculated as: originalCost - accumulatedDepreciation
Updates fixed asset status to DISPOSED or SOLD
Prevents disposal if asset has unposted depreciation for current period (force user to run depreciation first)
Journal entry includes source_document_type: ASSET_DISPOSAL for audit trail
npx vitest run passes
npx tsc --noEmit passes

features.title: AR/AP Aging Summary on Receivables & Payables Pages
acceptance_criteria: app/finance/receivables/page.tsx shows aging KPI strip at top: Current | 1-30 Hari | 31-60 Hari | 61-90 Hari | >90 Hari — each bucket shows count and total Rp amount
app/finance/payables/page.tsx shows same aging KPI strip for AP
Aging data sourced from getARAgingReport() and getAPAgingReport() from finance-reports.ts (reuse existing logic)
Each aging bucket is clickable — filters the list below to show only invoices/bills in that bucket
Total Outstanding shown matches GL account balance (1200 for AR, 2000 for AP)
Overdue amounts (>0 days past due) shown in red text per NB design system
KPI strip follows NB.kpiStrip / NB.kpiCell pattern from lib/dialog-styles.ts
npx vitest run passes
npx tsc --noEmit passes
